name: CCC Intelligent Solutions Auto Claims API
what_it_does: CCC Intelligent Solutions REST API for automotive insurance claims and collision repair ecosystem. Enables AI agents to manage vehicle damage estimates and AI-powered photo estimating, handle total loss valuation and settlement workflows, access repair assignment and shop matching, retrieve parts sourcing and OEM/aftermarket data, manage FNOL and claims intake, handle AI-powered damage detection from images, access subrogation and recovery workflows, retrieve claims performance analytics, manage rental and transportation data, and integrate auto claims with carrier, shop, and vehicle data systems.
use_cases: Managing AI-powered vehicle damage assessment from auto claims automation agents
Processing total loss valuations and settlements from claims handling agents
Accessing repair shop assignment and DRP management from claims workflow agents
Retrieving claims performance analytics from auto insurance intelligence agents
not_for: Non-automotive insurance without vehicle damage and collision repair focus
General P&C insurance without auto-specific claims and repair management
Consumer auto shopping without insurance claims and repair workflow
best_when: A P&C auto insurer, collision repair MSO, or automotive claims organization using CCC wants AI agents to automate damage assessment, photo estimating, total loss valuation, repair routing, and claims analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Auto claims include sensitive accident data, injury information, and financial settlement amounts. AI damage assessment results are inputs to financial decisions — require human review for high-value claims. Total loss valuations affect settlement — errors create legal liability. Photo and vehicle data have privacy considerations.

auth.notes: CCC uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Carrier and shop-level credentials with claims, estimating, and vehicle scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. CCC ONE platform integrations. Webhooks for claims and estimate events. AI-powered features (CCC Estimate-STP, CCC Total Loss).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — auto claims enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-claim and volume enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. NASDAQ: CCCS. Founded 1980. Market leader for auto insurance claims ecosystem. $800M+ annual revenue. Used by 300+ insurers and 28,000+ repair facilities. 6M+ claims processed annually. AI-powered photo estimating (CCC Estimate-STP). Acquired WeGoLook 2019. Competes with Solera (Audatex) for auto claims platform.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: AI damage estimates affect settlement amounts — high-value claims require human review
Total loss valuations are financial decisions — automated settlement requires carrier approval workflow
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with enterprise partner program
AI photo estimating (STP) is a separate workflow — photo submission and AI results have specific API patterns
DRP (direct repair program) shop assignment must respect carrier-shop agreements
US-only data residency — important for international auto insurers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Auto claims and accident data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US data residency. Claims settlement sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Auto claims data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US data residency. Accident and injury data sensitivity.
